reviews.comment:
-1 ☆ Solo efectivo!! Pleno 2022! viajaba desde Córdoba ni debito ni la aplicación recorrí todo Santiago del Estero en la madrugada para buscar un YPF y cargar infinia otros directamente cerrado!!

(Translated by Google)
-1 ☆ Cash only!! Full 2022! I was traveling from Córdoba, neither debit nor the app worked. I traveled all over Santiago del Estero in the early morning to find a YPF and fill up with Infinia gas; others were simply closed!!
